title: Kenyan Tuna Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Kenyan flavors, this dish is a unique twist on traditional tacos. The combination of tuna, silky tortillas, and floral cilantro creates a refreshing and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spices (or similar)
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the Kenyan Spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the flaked tuna and cook until heated through.
Warm the silky tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the tuna mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of stew salsa and a sprinkle of floral cilantro.
For the stew salsa, combine stew, lime juice, salt, and pepper in a bowl and mix until well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
